query: I want to set up round-robin auto-assignment so new conversations are evenly distributed among my team's agents. How?
expected_behavior: Creates automation rule with event_name: 'conversation_created'
Uses assign_team action to route to team (which handles round-robin internally)
May also show assign_agent action for direct assignment
Explains conditions for scoping (e.g., inbox_id, channel)
References the auto-assignment pattern

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May suggest custom scripting rather than using Chatwoot's built-in automation

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - correct automation rule with team-based round-robin approach

query: I need an SLA escalation system: if a conversation hasn't been responded to within 15 minutes, it should be escalated to a supervisor. How can I do this?
expected_behavior: Explains that Chatwoot automation events are not time/SLA-based directly
Suggests using reports_overview or conversations_filter to find overdue conversations
Shows periodic checking pattern: filter for open conversations with FRT > threshold
Uses conversation_assignments_assign to reassign to supervisor
May mention external scheduler or webhook for the timer

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May try to create a timestamp-based automation rule which doesn't exist in Chatwoot

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - correctly identifies the limitation and provides practical workaround pattern

query: I want to create a simple chatbot that greets users and collects their email before handing off to a human agent. How do I build this?
expected_behavior: Creates agent bot with agent_bots_create
Attaches to inbox with agent_bots_attach_to_inbox
Explains the webhook-based bot flow: receive message events → send responses
Shows bot-to-human handoff pattern (bot resolves, human picks up OR conversation_assignments_assign)
Mentions outgoing_url for bot webhook endpoint

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May suggest third-party bot frameworks without covering Chatwoot's native agent bot system

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - complete bot setup with native Chatwoot tools and handoff pattern

query: I want to integrate Chatwoot with our issue tracker so that when a conversation is labeled 'bug', a webhook fires to create an issue. How?
expected_behavior: Creates webhook with webhooks_create subscribed to conversation_updated
Explains webhook payload format including label changes
Suggests automation rule to detect label assignment if automation event supports it
Shows the integration pattern: webhook → external handler → action
Mentions integration_hooks tools as alternative

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May suggest generic webhook setup without Chatwoot-specific event names or payload format

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - correct webhook configuration with proper event subscription and integration pattern
